[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 1001000 2
1 0010100 2
2 0000000 a
3 0000000 a
4 1011111 6
5 1101011 5
6 1110111 6
7 0111100 4

12 21 1100011 4

34 43 0100100 2

56 65 1000000 1
67 76 0000000 a match 2 3
70 07 0010100 2 match 1

46 64 0000000 a match 2 3
